nodes.label: K-Shaped Economy and Market Dispersion
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 103329_冰冰小美_五月统计数据，继续K型经济。消费下行负增长，高端制造业投资增速15%。反应市场，75%跌25%涨。.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Negative consumption growth and 15% high-end manufacturing investment growth are used to characterize a K-shaped economy and a market where most stocks decline while a minority rise.
